title: NORPRO Non-Slip Rubber Jar Opener, 1 EA, White
description:
About this item
Rubber grips the lid making jar open quickly and easily.
Ideal for small to large lids.
Also use as a rubber mat to hold wet or slippery objects.
Essential for every kitchen.
Measures: 6" X 6"/ 15cm x 15cm
reviews_5s:
This has helped me open some tough jars . With Arthritis it’s really hard to open certain jars and containers, this worked great ! Good grip .One of 3 different jar opener pad design that I purchased to try out. The thickest of the 3 pad types I tried, but still has good flexibility. Surprised that the bottom surface was not textured, but still provides a very good grip. The thicker pad design compared to others will certainly be durable. The 2-pack I purchased provides me with a back-up pad. While the product webpage indicates a 6-inch diameter, the actual diameter is 5.5 inches.

Pad style jar openers provide a better grip on the jar lid than a bare hand alone. But hand and wrist strength are still needed to open the jar. If an improved grip is not enough assistance, then mechanical or electrical jar openers my be a better option.Sturdy and works.Lately I've been having to ask my husband to open some bottles so decided to order this as I used to have something similar and I can't find it anywhere. This jar and bottle opener works on lids as small as a vanilla bottle lid or as big as a pickle jar lid! What this does is really grip the lid so your natural strength is enough to get the bottle open. I'm very happy with this and think it will last me a while! It will save me time walking bottles to the back bedroom to ask my husband to open them! He thinks I'm strong enough but sometimes a lid simply won't open!!! So I'd consider this essential to my happiness! After 50 you may consider this a much needed item!

~The Rebecca ReviewAttractiveThis jar lid grabber looks cute..it’s a nice size and it has a little hole for hanging it up where I can reach quick.Everyone needs one of these in their kitchen. It helps with jars that are really hard to open. Very durable.Super gripQuality made.Works great on jars.
reviews_1s:
Save your money this is junk. I tried opening several jars and no success. I had to run hot water on the jars to open. Terrible.These provide very little grip as they are not rubber. Save your moneyThe material this is made of is too stiff. It won’t bend enough to wrap around a jar lid to open it.I feel insulted ! The photo is exactly how it came out of a few bags. Inspected as per photo ?
You got to be joking ?! 😡 If I was standing there to "Inspect" it would've NEVER pass !
You DO NOT SEND customers something like this and I definitely wouldn't if that was my
JOB ! I am returning it. I haven't even used it still with all bags it came in. I'm going start
thinking twice shopping online.This did not work for me, but return was easy. This gripper is too thick to securely grab hold of the jars I was trying to open.1. Review for NORPRO 597 Non-Slip Rubber Jar Opener (2), white.
2. Did not open a jar. I have weak not unusually shaped or differently abled hands; notably, all hands are beautiful and appreciated. Product was useless.
3. I ordered 2 and received 1.
4. I would not purchase again, unless it was for someone I did not like.
5. I requested a refund.
6. Product is plastic and not recyclable.
6.PRODUCT IS NOT MADE WITH PROPER MATERIAL USED FOR THESE DISCS. IT IS TOO STIFF, TOO THICK AND SLIDES RIGHT OFF BOTTLE OR JAR. IT NEEDS TO BE MADE OF THINNER, BUT DURABLE,
SLIGHTLY ROUGHENED SURFACE. BANKS AND OTHER BUSINESSES GAVE THESE THINGS AWAY AS GIFTS
YEARS AGO AND THEY WORKED VERY WELL. THESE DO NOT WORK AT ALL...A PAIR OF PLIERS IS EASIER...AND MUCH FASTER.
GYPSYSEAL@aol.comBought these to use for opening 32 ounce sports drink bottles. The product is too thick and rigid for this purpose. It also does not provide adequate texture to enhance grip on the bottle lid/cap.

May this will work right if you your lid has a larger surface area. For small lids, it is useless.These rubber pads are thick and stiff so they don't grip the jar lid well. I had another one for years that was very thin and pliable. It hung over the lid and gripped really well making the jar easy to open. These thick ones add enough bulk and thickness that it makes it harder to grip well. I wish I could find the thinner ones again.So glad I didnt buy two!
If you have weak hands and need a really good grip, this is not the right tool to use. It is too slick and too thick. One side is very smooth. The other has the decor raised lines. Thats it. No real grip for weak or pained hands.
